source_document: ISO 14971:2019 — Application of risk management to medical devices

rules.obligation: Overall residual risk must be evaluated against benefit; the conclusion must be supported by PMS data.
rules.agent_instruction: Section M benefit-risk synthesis must reference how the residual risk evaluation was informed by this period's PMS data.

rules.obligation: Manufacturer must establish a system to collect and review information about the device in the production and post-production phases, including incidents, complaints and trend data, and feed it back into the risk management file.
rules.agent_instruction: Reference the risk management file when CAPA or trend findings update risk acceptability.
